segments.text: Good afternoon everyone, and welcome to our third quarter fiscal 2026 earnings call.
Total revenue for the quarter came in at a record 68.1 billion dollars, up 73 percent year over year.
Data center remained our largest segment, accounting for over 91 percent of sales.
Gross margin expanded to 75 percent, driven by strong demand for our AI accelerator platforms.
Looking ahead, we are raising full-year guidance and expect continued strength into the next fiscal year.
We also announced an additional 80 billion dollar share repurchase authorization and raised the quarterly dividend.
With that, let's open the line for questions.
